name: Lokahi
description_short: Lōkahi Federal Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution serving Oʻahu residents, workers, and students since 1936 with competitive loan rates and community-focused banking services.
description_long:
Lōkahi Federal Credit Union was founded in 1936 as the Hawaiian Air Depot Employees Federal Credit Union and later operated as Hickam Federal Credit Union before rebranding as Lōkahi in 2024. The credit union is deeply rooted in Oʻahu's community and has grown alongside the island while maintaining its mission of empowering members and strengthening the local economy. The name "Lōkahi" reflects the Hawaiian concept of unity and harmony, emphasizing the organization's belief that communities are stronger together.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including auto loans (new and used vehicles, motorcycles), personal loans, credit cards with no annual fees, and deposit accounts including Rate+ Checking with up to 5.00% APY. Members can access a mobile app for convenient account management, enhanced debit and credit card controls, and online banking services. Lōkahi also provides specialty programs including a First Time Borrower Program to help members build credit, a Skip-A-Pay program for financial flexibility, and loan application services. Current advertised rates include auto loans as low as 3.75% APR for new vehicles and 5.00% APR for used vehicles.

What distinguishes Lōkahi is its open membership policy—anyone who lives, works, worships, or attends school on Oʻahu can join, removing geographic or employment restrictions common at some credit unions. The organization actively engages in community service, including partnerships with the Hawaii HomeOwnership Center and participation in local safety initiatives. Members consistently praise the personalized customer service, with testimonials highlighting staff helpfulness and accessibility at multiple physical locations across Oʻahu.

As a member-owned, not-for-profit institution insured by the NCUA, Lōkahi prioritizes member value over shareholder profit. However, membership is geographically limited to Oʻahu residents, workers, and students, which restricts access for consumers outside Hawaii. The organization has also issued scam alerts regarding fraudulent callers impersonating their fraud department, indicating members should remain vigilant about unsolicited contact.
services: New auto loans with rates as low as 3.75% APR
Used auto loans with rates as low as 5.00% APR
New and used motorcycle loans (6.75-7.25% APR)
Credit cards with no annual fees, balance transfer fees, or cash advance fees
Rate+ Checking accounts with up to 5.00% APY
Share deposit accounts and share certificates
First Time Borrower Program for credit building
Mobile banking app with card management features
pros: Competitive auto loan rates starting at 3.75% APR for new vehicles and 5.00% APR for used vehicles
Rate+ Checking account offering up to 5.00% APY on deposits
No annual fees, balance transfer fees, or cash advance fees on credit cards
First Time Borrower Program specifically designed to help members establish credit history
Open membership policy for anyone living, working, worshiping, or attending school on Oʻahu—no employment restrictions
Skip-A-Pay program providing financial flexibility during unexpected hardships
Active community involvement including homeownership grants and family ID services
Mobile app and online banking with enhanced card management features
cons: Membership limited to Oʻahu only—not accessible to consumers outside Hawaii
Personal loan rates start at 7.50% APR, which is higher than some competitors
Motorcycle loan rates (6.75-7.25% APR) are relatively high compared to auto loans
Limited branch and ATM network compared to large national banks
Website does not clearly display deposit insurance limits or NCUA coverage details
best_for: Oʻahu residents and workers seeking personalized, community-focused banking with competitive auto lending rates
First-time borrowers looking to establish credit with supportive member service and educational programs
Consumers prioritizing not-for-profit member ownership and local community reinvestment over national brand convenience
Hawaii-based savers seeking higher-yield checking accounts and flexible loan options
diagnosis: Lōkahi Federal Credit Union is best for Oʻahu residents seeking competitive auto financing and personal banking services from a member-owned, community-focused institution. The primary caveat is geographic restriction—membership is limited to those living, working, worshiping, or attending school on Oʻahu, making this inaccessible for consumers outside Hawaii.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Lokahi — Credit Union in Honolulu, HI | CreditDoc
meta_description: Lokahi — NCUA-insured credit union in Honolulu, HI. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
